case_title: MICKEY HONG VS. PETER KOEHLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-24-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,828.00 FILED BY HONG, MICKEY AS TO DEFENDANT KOEHLER, PETER DBA  P&S TOWING & RECOVERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,828.00 FILED BY HONG, MICKEY AS TO DEFENDANT KOEHLER, PETER DBA  P&S TOWING & RECOVERY PP&M TOWING & RECOVERY INC
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HONG, MICKEY
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO OFFICER WILLIAM ROSSI (STAR #514) 850 BRYANT STREET;SF,CA
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF,AMENDING CLAIM TO ADD SECOND DEFENDANT:PP&M TOWING & RECOVERY INC FILED BY PLAINTIFF HONG, MICKEY
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, CORRECTING ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT PETER KOEHLER (FROM SAN FRANCISCO TO SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HONG, MICKEY
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPT., "SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL / BAD ADDRESS".

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF HONG, MICKEY AS TO DEFENDANT KOEHLER, PETER DBA  P&S TOWING & RECOVERY PP&M TOWING & RECOVERY INC CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-24-2010 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
